title: oreodaphne tinctoria
intro: Oreodaphne tinctoria, also known as Sandan leaf or Yellow Wood, is a plant species native to China, commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its use in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Oreodaphne tinctoria include reducing fever, relieving headaches and body aches, and improving digestion. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in topical applications to promote wound healing and skin health.
